hypothesis:
## Hypothesis

Incorporating graph-based structural embeddings alongside the multimodal textual representations in STR-Bamba will enable the model to capture stereochemical information and 3D conformational properties that are inaccessible to string-based encodings alone, thereby improving prediction accuracy for chirality-dependent and conformation-sensitive molecular properties beyond the current state-of-the-art performance on tasks such as optical rotation prediction and protein-ligand binding affinity estimation.
